title: Oil Falls Amid Easing Geopolitical Tensions
section_path: Oil Falls Amid Easing Geopolitical Tensions
section_path_text: Oil Falls Amid Easing Geopolitical Tensions
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Easing geopolitical risks weighed on energy prices last week, compounded by fading expectations of an imminent Fed rate cut. Crude oil prices slumped last week as early negotiations to halt the bombardment of Gaza and release hostages gained traction. The four-month Israel-Hamas conflict has raised concerns that it would spread across the Middle East and disrupt oil supplies.
